equipment.name: Hyper-Toxicity
equipment.desc: All melee weapons of the model gain "Precision(4+)". Unique. Gorgon only.

equipment.name: Monstrous Hunger
equipment.desc: All melee weapons of the model gain "Soul burn(5+)". Unique. Behemoth only.

equipment.name: One Step Ahead
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 25% Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique. Kraken only.

equipment.name: Perfectly Adapted
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Unique. Leviathan only.

equipment.name: Symbiostorm
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain +1 Strength. Unique. Kronos only.
